message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.8

New feature: hierarchical child IDs for epic children

When creating issues with --parent, children now get sequential
IDs based on the parent (e.g., epic-abc.1, epic-abc.2) instead
of random hash-based IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.7"
+version = "0.1.8"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
